test-method.name: tc01_PageTitleValidation
test-method.description: Validate page title of the application

test-method.name: tc02_NameField
test-method.description: Enter text in the Name field

test-method.name: tc03_EmailField
test-method.description: Enter text in the Email field

test-method.name: tc04_PhoneField
test-method.description: Enter text in the Phone field

test-method.name: tc05_AddressField
test-method.description: Enter text in the Address textarea

test-method.name: tc08_Dropdowns
test-method.description: Select Country, Color and Animal dropdowns

test-method.name: tc14_DoubleClick
test-method.description: Double click Copy Text button to copy field1 to field2

test-method.name: tc15_DragAndDrop
test-method.description: Drag draggable element onto droppable target

test-method.name: tc16_Slider
test-method.description: Move the slider 100px to the right

test-method.name: tc17_Alerts
test-method.description: Handle Simple, Confirm and Prompt alerts

test-method.name: tc18_MiscFeatures
test-method.description: Hyperlink count, scroll, combobox, new tab, popup
